summary: Iteration 12: The Honeypot Rename & Restructure - ALL FEATURES WORKING. Nav renamed from 'Marketplace'/'ISO' to 'The Honeypot'. 3-tab structure (Shop/ISO/Trade) implemented. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All 20+ UI elements verified.
passed_tests: ROUTE: /iso redirects to /honeypot (via auth then redirect)
ROUTE: /trades redirects to /honeypot (via auth then redirect)
SUBCOPY: 'buy, trade, and hunt with collectors like you.' present
TAB: Shop tab is DEFAULT active on page load
TAB: Shop tab shows Buy Now and Make Offer listings
CTA: Shop tab CTA button says '+ List a Record'
TAB: ISO tab shows 'Your Hunt List' section
TAB: ISO tab shows 'The Community Hunt' section
CTA: ISO tab CTA changes to '+ Add to Hunt List'
TAB: Trade tab shows 'Active Trades' section with status badges
TAB: Trade tab shows 'Browse Trades' section with trade-only listings
CTA: Trade tab CTA changes to '+ List for Trade'
MODAL: Shop tab modal title is 'List a Record'
MODAL: ISO tab modal title is 'Add to Hunt List'
MODAL: Trade tab modal title is 'List for Trade'
MOBILE: mobile-honeypot nav present (renamed from iso)
BACKEND: /api/iso/community only returns OPEN status ISOs
BACKEND: Listings properly classified BUY_NOW/MAKE_OFFER vs TRADE
critical_code_review_comments: Community ISO 'I have this' button not tested with live data - no community ISOs from other users available (demo user only)
Some placeholder images showing broken (ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED) - likely test data with invalid URLs
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Honeypot rename complete. All nav items updated (desktop: The Hive, Explore, Collection, The Honeypot; mobile: same structure). ISOPage.js completely rewritten with 3-tab structure (Shop/ISO/Trade). Dynamic CTA and modal titles per tab working. /api/iso/community endpoint returns other users' OPEN ISOs with user info attached. Routes /iso and /trades redirect to /honeypot. ProposeTradeModal imported from TradesPage.js into ISOPage.js. Trade tab's 'Active Trades' shows trades with status badges (Shipping, Accepted, Proposed, etc.). Some test listing images have broken URLs but functionality works.

components: Desktop nav: The Hive, Explore, Collection, The Honeypot
Sub-copy: 'buy, trade, and hunt with collectors like you.'
'I have this' button on community ISOs (when available)
GET /api/iso/community - returns other users' OPEN ISOs with user info
GET /api/listings - returns all listings with listing_type
GET /api/trades - returns user's trades with status
